description.html:
Ursines are proud, strong, and independent beings descended from powerful bears. They possess a natural affinity for the wild and a profound respect for nature and tradition.

Ursine's appearance is as varied as their attitudes.

URSINE TRAITS

You have the following racial traits.

Ability Score Increases. When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one of those scores by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. Follow this rule regardless of the method you use to determine the scores, such as rolling or point buy.

Languages. You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for your character.

Creature Type. You are a Humanoid.

Size. You are Medium.

Darkvision. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

Speed. Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

Bear's Talent. You have proficiency in the Persuasion and Stealth skills. Also, you gain advantage on any Perception check that benefits your powerful sense of smell.

Bearskin. You have tough, furry skin. When you aren't wearing armor, your base AC is 13 + Dexterity modifier. You can use your natural armor to determine your AC if the armor you wear would leave you with a lower AC. A shield's benefits apply as normal while you use your natural armor.

Powerful Build. You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.
Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

sheet.description: Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

description.html: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

sheet.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

description.html: You have proficiency in the Persuasion and Stealth skills. Also, you gain advantage on any Perception check that benefits your powerful sense of smell.

sheet.description: You have proficiency in the Persuasion and Stealth skills. Also, you gain advantage on any Perception check that benefits your powerful sense of smell.

description.html: You have tough, furry skin. When you aren't wearing armor, your base AC is 13 + Dexterity modifier. You can use your natural armor to determine your AC if the armor you wear would leave you with a lower AC. A shield's benefits apply as normal while you use your natural armor.

sheet.description: When you aren't wearing armor, your base AC is 13 + Dex modifier. You can use your natural armor to determine your AC if the armor you wear would leave you with a lower AC. A shield's benefits apply as normal while you use your natural armor.

description.html: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

sheet.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

description.p: Forest Ursines are quick, agile black bears native to dense woodlands. They are known for their stealth, grace, and exceptional climbing abilities among the forest canopy.
Ability Score Increases: Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.
Canopy Climber: Your climbing speed doesn't reduce your movement speed, and you have advantage on Stealth checks made in forested areas.

description.html: Your climbing speed doesn't reduce your movement speed, and you have advantage on Stealth checks made in forested areas.

sheet.description: Your climbing speed doesn't reduce your movement speed, and you have advantage on Stealth checks made in forested areas.

description.p: Mountain Ursines are massive grizzly bears from the high peaks, renowned for their incredible strength and dominance. They are apex predators feared by all who encounter them.
Ability Score Increases: Your Strength score increases by 2, and your Constitution score increases by 1.
Apex Predator: You have advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to grapple or shove. Additionally, when using your claws or bite as natural weapons, they deal 1d8 damage instead of 1d6.

description.html: You have advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to grapple or shove. Additionally, when using your claws or bite as natural weapons, they deal 1d8 damage instead of 1d6.

sheet.description: You have advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to grapple or shove. Your claws or bite natural weapons deal 1d8 damage instead of 1d6.

description.p: Polar Ursines are massive arctic hunters from the frozen wastelands. Thick fur and powerful physiology allow them to thrive in the harshest environments on the material plane.
Ability Score Increases: Your Constitution score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.
Thick Pelt: You have resistance to cold damage. You can hold your breath for a number of hours equal to your Constitution modifier (minimum 1 hour) and can swim while holding your breath.

description.html: You have resistance to cold damage. You can hold your breath for a number of hours equal to your Constitution modifier (minimum 1 hour) and can swim while holding your breath.

sheet.description: You have resistance to cold damage. You can hold your breath for a number of hours equal to your Constitution modifier (minimum 1 hour) and can swim while holding your breath.

description.p: Panda Ursines are rare and philosophical beings who have chosen a path of harmony over conflict. Though physically powerful like their kin, they prefer wisdom, compassion, and understanding. These peaceful bears are often sought out as counsel and friends.
Ability Score Increases: Your Intelligence score increases by 2, and your Charisma score increases by 1.

Peaceful Nature: You have proficiency in the Insight and Animal Handling skills. Once per long rest, you can cast Goodberry at 1st level using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability, without expending a spell slot.

description.html: You have proficiency in the Insight and Animal Handling skills. Once per long rest, you can cast Goodberry at 1st level using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability, expending no spell slot.

sheet.description: You have proficiency in Insight and Animal Handling skills. Once per long rest, you can cast Goodberry at 1st level using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability, without expending a spell slot.

description.p: Shadow Ursines are rare and enigmatic bears touched by shadow magic. They possess an otherworldly charm and affinity for darkness, making them mysterious and often misunderstood by their kin.
Ability Score Increases: Your Charisma score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.

Umbral Affinity: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. Once per long rest, you can cast Invisibility on yourself without concentration and without expending a spell slot.

description.html: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. Once per long rest, you can cast Invisibility on yourself without concentration and without expending a spell slot.

sheet.description: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip. Once per long rest, you can cast Invisibility on yourself (no concentration required) without expending a spell slot.
